compiled_state.title: Plugin update migration: PIL-bearing epics after plugin update -> brainstorm:complete tag not back-filled
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Expected Behavior

After the plugin update that installed the PIL-guarded `brainstorm:complete` auto-tagger (epic 9213-2746), all pre-existing epics whose descriptions contain Problem/Intent/Lenses (PIL) fields should have been back-filled with the `brainstorm:complete` tag — either by a migration running on plugin update, or by the tag-management CLI back-fill pass.

## Actual Behavior

Running `/dso:sprint` on 2026-04-18 showed only 2 epics with `brainstorm:complete` while 85 epics without the tag were hidden. Many hidden epics contain PIL fields from earlier brainstorm sessions and should qualify.

Two possible root causes (either or both):

1. **Migration did not run on plugin update** — no back-fill migration executed when the plugin was updated to the version containing the auto-tagger.
2. **Migration ran but missed PIL-bearing epics** — a migration ran but its PIL-detection logic did not identify epics that satisfy the guard.

## Impact

- `/dso:sprint` interactive selection surfaces 2 of ~87 ready epics.
- Users must re-run `/dso:brainstorm` on already-scrutinized epics to trigger the tag, duplicating work.
- Backlog appears artificially empty, masking sprint-ready work.

## Reproduction

1. `.claude/scripts/dso sprint-list-epics.sh --all --has-tag=brainstorm:complete` → 2 epics.
2. `.claude/scripts/dso sprint-list-epics.sh --all` → ~94 lines (87 non-BLOCKED).
3. Spot-check hidden epics (e.g., `.claude/scripts/dso ticket show 736d-b957`) — several have PIL-field descriptions but lack the tag.

## Investigation starting points

- Locate any migration/back-fill script tied to epic 9213-2746 (PIL-guarded brainstorm:complete CLI).
- Check `update-artifacts` / plugin-update flow for migration hooks.
- Verify PIL-detection logic against sample hidden epics.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral. Score: severity=1, complexity=1, environment=0, flaky=0 → total=2 (BASIC). Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Investigation findings (pre-dispatch): (1) Migration marker .claude/.brainstorm-tag-migration-v1 does NOT exist — migration has never run in this repo. (2) 87 open epics: 27 have children (i.e., went through preplanning), but only 2 are tagged brainstorm:complete. (3) Of those 27, 15 have PIL heading present (migration WOULD tag them if it ran) and 12 have children but NO literal PIL heading (migration would NOT tag them even if it ran). User confirms: epics-with-children should be considered brainstormed regardless of literal PIL heading.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fix approved (A+C code; B manual). testing_mode=RED (new coverage for SNAPSHOT/EDIT-fields PIL detection).
comments.author: Test
